message:
feat: Generic extension module loading and string parsing fixes

- Fix string constant parsing to strip quotes in parser (not codegen)
  - parseString(), parseByteString(), parseRawString() now strip quotes
  - Removed redundant stripPythonQuotes() in codegen

- Fix tuple() type inference for string/list arguments
  - Count UTF-8 characters to determine tuple size
  - Create proper tuple types for literal list arguments

- Make c_interop extension loading fully generic
  - Dynamic site-packages discovery for Python 3.8-3.13
  - Support VIRTUAL_ENV, .venv, mise, pyenv, homebrew paths
  - Try all ABI versions (cpython-38 through cpython-313)
  - Support abi3 stable ABI extensions
  - Platform-specific extensions (darwin.so, linux-gnu.so, .pyd)

- Fix builtinLen() for slices
  - Check isSlice() before .pointer to avoid @hasField on primitives
  - Add struct type checks before using @hasField/@hasDecl

- Various c_interop improvements for CPython compatibility
